## Highlight Syntax

This sentence has ==highlighted text== in the middle.

Multiple ==first highlight== and ==second highlight== on one line.

==Start of line== highlighted.

End of line ==highlighted==.

Regular text without any highlights stays normal.

Single = equals = signs are not highlights.

## Highlight in Context

- List item with ==important part== marked
- Another item without highlight

> Blockquote with ==highlighted== content.

**Bold and ==highlighted== together.**
